user_system_path: LANDING design pass (#496), promoted to the active seam at owner request 2026-06-21 (pausing the Scout seam #494 as the active one). Owner-directed landing-page craft pass under the binding bar in docs/DESIGN_SYSTEM.md, on the dedicated landing branch. Lead surface: components/foldera/LandingPage.tsx via the token-driven .ld layer. Sharpen hierarchy (hero trust badges, framed stats) and replace the floating how-it-works numbers with a connected flow. Preserves every landing data-testid, the asserted copy, the section order, and the CTA href contract; no new public-facing claim terms; no auto-send. The Scout build (#494) is untouched and resumes once this lands.
allowed_files_raw: LANDING seam #496: marketing landing surface only — components/foldera/LandingPage.tsx (+ shared nav/footer components), app/page.tsx, app/globals.css (the .ld design layer), marketing routes, brand assets in public/**, and landing e2e specs. Control-plane + Bible governance edits permitted. Design must hold the bar in docs/DESIGN_SYSTEM.md.
forbidden_files_raw: No dashboard, no app/api/** (backend/auth/cron/Scout routes), no Stripe, no DB migrations, no secrets/.env. No new public-facing claim terms (SOC2/SSO/SCIM/surveillance/auto-send). No section-order, data-testid, or asserted-copy removal on the landing page.
required_local_proof: npm run gate:continuity && npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run build
required_browser_proof: Landing/UI lane (AGENTS.md dashboard/UI proof gate + DESIGN_SYSTEM.md §12). The landing contract must hold at 390 / 768 / 1440: section order, locked copy (hero heading, 'high-paid filing clerk', 'The reconstruction tax', 'broken continuity', 'No surveillance', 'It lives where you work', 'Stop checking nine apps'), CTA hrefs -> /start, zero horizontal overflow, >=44px tap targets. Standard Playwright e2e (public-routes + landing-hero-visual-qa + landing-mobile-sections) runs on CI; meeting the e2e is necessary, not sufficient — the DESIGN_SYSTEM.md §12 quality bar is the real gate.
browser_proof_command: npx playwright test tests/e2e/landing-hero-visual-qa.spec.ts tests/e2e/landing-mobile-sections.spec.ts tests/e2e/public-routes.spec.ts --reporter=list
acceptance_condition: Landing change lands additively: gate:continuity + typecheck + lint(0) + build green; the landing contract holds at 390/768/1440 with no section-order / data-testid / asserted-copy regression and zero horizontal overflow; the change is obviously better against DESIGN_SYSTEM.md §12, token-driven (no raw-hex drift in components), and introduces no forbidden public-facing claim term. Hygiene-only without the visual bar met is NO PASS.
anti_regression_checks: every landing data-testid, the section order, and asserted landing copy preserved
landing CTA hrefs still resolve to /start
no forbidden public-facing claim terms in app/components/public
Workday Presence + Scout pipelines unchanged (no app/api/** or lib/scout/** edits)
stop_condition: Landing design pass (#496) lands as a draft PR on claude/landing-page-design-fixes-wub5aj; gate:continuity green at #496; landing contract verified at 390/768/1440. Then resume the Scout seam (#494): its runtime activation stays BLOCKED_WITH_EXACT_RECEIPT (owner-gated — VOYAGE_API_KEY, SCOUT_*/ALLOW_PAID_LLM flags, CRON_SECRET cron triggers, ENCRYPTION_KEY_LEGACY decrypt).
next_command: Review/merge the #496 landing draft PR (owner taste + the DESIGN_SYSTEM.md §12 bar). On merge, repoint the control plane back to #494 and proceed with owner-gated Scout activation.
